qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Incomplete hook coverage leaves pickle.loads unprotected and enables code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets incomplete pickle hook/context coverage in fickling/hook.py and fickling/context.py, not the advisory's AST-emission blind spot where builtins imports were omitted from fickling/fickle.py and therefore missed by unsafe-import analysis.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Malformed STACK_GLOBAL operands trigger uncaught recursion in AST and safety analysis
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Although it also touches fickling/fickle.py, this finding is a malformed-operand recursion crash in STACK_GLOBAL fallback handling; the advisory fixes a different root cause by emitting builtins import AST nodes so unsafe-import checks can see them.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the final qualifying findings identifies the advisory's vulnerable code or root cause. GHSA-h4rm-mm56-xf63 is specifically the builtins-import detection bypass fixed by always emitting builtins import AST nodes in fickling/fickle.py for Global/StackGlobal/Inst handling.
evidence: The advisory patch 9f309ab834797f280cb5143a2f6f987579fa7cdf removes the special-case suppression for module values '__builtin__', '__builtins__', and 'builtins' and always appends ImportFrom AST nodes in fickling/fickle.py.

The advisory regression test test_builtins_import_bypass asserts that check_safety() now reports 'from builtins import getattr', showing the root cause is analysis blindness to builtins imports rather than a generic pickle execution bug.
hook_pickle_loads_bypass_rce instead describes documented hook/context defenses failing to patch pickle.loads/_pickle.loads, which is a separate boundary in hook.py/context.py.

malformed_stack_global_recursion_dos instead describes uncaught recursion during malformed STACK_GLOBAL identifier extraction, which is a denial-of-service bug distinct from the advisory's unsafe-import detection bypass.
